meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code to build your first project.
content.answer_block: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap by leveraging Claude Code to accelerate your development lifecycle. By integrating Antigravity for automated boilerplate generation and Claude Code for iterative refactoring, you can ship production-grade features in hours, not weeks. This workflow builds a robust, verifiable project history that proves your engineering competence to recruiters.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank repository, the cursor blinking in a rhythmic taunt. You have the theoretical knowledge, but your GitHub profile is a digital ghost town. In the high-stakes world of AI engineering, nobody cares about your GPA; they care about what you can ship. The gap between a student and a hired developer is measured in working code.

Today, we bridge that gap. We aren't just writing code; we are weaponizing your development workflow. By pairing Antigravity’s architectural scaffolding with the sheer cognitive horsepower of Claude Code, you will transform a simple idea into a polished, portfolio-ready application. This is your first step toward professional relevance.

steps.title: Initialize the Scaffolding
steps.description: Establish a clean, professional project structure that signals maturity to future employers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a professional project structure for a full-stack SaaS application using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase. Include standard CI/CD configuration files.

steps.title: Define the Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your user stories into technical requirements that Claude can interpret and execute.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a technical specification document for a user authentication and profile management system using Supabase Auth.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement Supabase auth based on the generated spec'

steps.title: Automate Unit Testing
steps.description: A portfolio project without tests is just a prototype. Prove your engineering rigor.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive Jest test suite for the newly created authentication service, focusing on edge cases like invalid credentials and session expiry.

steps.title: Refactor for Performance
steps.description: Use AI to analyze your code for bottlenecks, demonstrating your commitment to clean code standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase for performance bottlenecks and suggest optimizations for React component re-renders.

steps.title: Document and Deploy
steps.description: Finalize your project with a README that sells your solution to potential hiring managers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a professional README.md that highlights the problem, solution, tech stack, and key engineering challenges solved.

pro_tips: Always commit your work using conventional commits (feat:, fix:, chore:) to show recruiters you understand professional git flow.
Use Claude Code's 'review' mode on your own code to find bugs before you even push to GitHub.
When building your portfolio, focus on solving one 'boring' business problem rather than building another weather app.
Integrate a 'How it works' section in your README that explains the architectural decisions you made with Claude.
Keep your Claude Code history clean by deleting temporary test branches once you have merged features into main.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, deploy it to Vercel or Netlify, add a live link to your GitHub bio, and start contributing to one open-source project using this exact same workflow.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to build a portfolio that stands out in a crowded market. Don't let another day pass without adding a production-grade project to your profile. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
